title: Semantics of Verilog logical shift (<<) operator

features.name: logical shift with width mismatch between operand and destination
features.description: Code should include a logical left shift (<<) where the operand width differs from the assignment destination width

features.name: WIDTHEXPAND warning on shift assignment
features.description: Code should include a shift operation that triggers Verilator WIDTHEXPAND warning due to LHS operand width being smaller than the destination
